titleStmt.title: SII 27.374: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 374. (A.R. No. 582 of 1929-30.) BAḌAGABEṬṬU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying by the side of the tank belonging to the private house called ‘Chitpāḍi-bīḍu’.
The record registers a gift of land for feeding the brahmaṇas in the maṭha at Chiṭṭapāḍi by Jinabhakta-Dēvaru-seṭṭi who purchased the land from Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-mūḍila for that purpose.
It is dated Śaka 1408, Viśvāvasu, Bhādrapada śu. 12, Tuesday corresponding to 1485 A.D., August 23. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁ
caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1408 neya viśvāvasu
saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 12 maṁgaḷavāradalu śrīmatu ci
ṭṭipāḍiyalli lakṣuminārāyaṇa mūḍilada bāḷu hola
dalliĀ caṁdrārkkavāgi biṭṭa pāḍiya ga Adakke mūḍa
baḍagahattilu bāviya niraṁdanāle vāḍiyanu
mūḍilaru taṁnamanaḥ pūrvakavāgi karaṇaṁtara baḷiya
hi da seṭṭiya Aḷiya dēvaruseṭṭi mūḍilavaru naḍasu
va sahāyadiṁda jayināgama saṁnutanāda śrī
jinabhakta dēvaruseṭṭi taṁna kayiṁda hoṁnakoṭṭu mūla
va koṁḍu baḍaga maṭhadalu 6 maṁdi brāṁhmaṇara bhōja
nake dharṁmma naḍava gēṇiya Akkiya taḷada vivara keṁmu
ḷage mūḍalu bayaliṁda paḍuvalu teṁkaba
yaliṁda baḍagalu paḍuva Ōṇiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍaga
raṁṇana bāgilagadeyiṁda teṁkalu A catusīme
ḷa gaṇa beṭṭubayalalu kōṭittimareṁba gade baṁ
beṭṭu bayalagēṇi Akki hā 40 lekkadamūḍe
Uppuṁjana kayiṁda koṁḍamaneyaḍi bā
gila gaḍeyamūḍe baḍi . bayalalu nittāḍiṁba ga
deya muḍebaḍi Aḍukattimaru kaḍimaru Adakuḷa
mūḍanela mara saha yellavakku gēṇi Akki hāne 40 le
kka mūḍe 15 mūḍa bayalalu mūḍillara tāḍu
yeṁba gaddeyagēṇi Akki mū 9 peraṁpaḷiyalu mū
ḍilara bāgila gaddeya gēṇi Akki mū 10 kēśanekāraniṁ
haThe rest of the record is badly
Digital edition of SII 27.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
